title: Smoke-Dusted Date Bliss
description: A savory and creamy Brazilian dish perfect for date nights, featuring a vegan-friendly twist with smoked dates and icing sugar.
instructions: Soften dates in hot water and remove pits. Stir dates with a fork until smooth.
Mix vegan butter, icing sugar, smoked paprika, oil, and almond flour together until the mixture coats well on the dates.
Preheat an oven-safe skillet or pan over medium heat. Place the date mixture into the heated pan and spread evenly.
Bake in preheated oven for 15 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
Garnish with extra smoked paprika if desired.
